extortion.description: Napierski, VanDenburgh, Napierski & O'Connor, L.L.P. is a leadingcivil litigation firm based in Albany, NY, specializing in various legal areas including medical malpractice defense, personal injury, and employment law.We are ready to upload about 6gb of corporate documents. There are SO MUCH personal documents. Full information of at least 150 oftheir clients (Full name, DOB, address, passport numbers, SSNs, DLs and so no). Employee personal information (DOB, addresses, phones, salaries and other information), a lot of court cases including ransomware and others, corporate information of dozens of companies will be uploaded. Stay tuned.
